The '''[[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] monk''' lived in [[Trid]] on [[Danuta]]. He was encountered by [[Jan Ors]] during her search for [[Kyle Katarn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
